text.tspan: The top wire, from NW, knows where the flower grows from
Similarly, the bottom wire, from SW, knows where the flowers
grows from the South glue. The bottom wire only needs to
crawl down when there is no flower in the next spot since
an empty spot means a possibility of
the wires go to the north, taking advantage
of the fact that there will always only be one
the wires take a weird path to ensure that it takes

even if the north probe went firsts
